tecnologia.titulo: Star Fox is the Switch 2’s most impressive visual showcase yet
tecnologia.resumen: The biggest Switch 2 exclusives so far have largely been about scale. tecnologia.titulo: I drove the Slate Truck — there’s more to it than EV minimalism
tecnologia.resumen: With its new pickup, Slate Auto is making a simple bet: price matters more than almost anything else. tecnologia.titulo: The Dyson PencilWash is down to its lowest price ever for Prime Day
tecnologia.resumen: Dyson’s PencilWash cordless hard floor cleaner is on sale for $199.99 ($150 off) at Amazon. This is the lowest price yet for the powered wet mop that’s a cousin to the silly-sounding-but-awesome Dyson PencilVac Fluffycones vacuum.
